calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant ATD Tools, Inc. is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-02-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
